jp.title: 【北浜流一郎のズバリ株先見！】 ─ 「キオクシア・ショック」の衝撃、目を転じるべき投資対象は？
jp.description: 「『キオクシア・ショック』の衝撃、目を転じるべき投資対象は？」●急失速したＡＩ・半導体相場の「希望の星」　「キオクシア・ショック」が東京市場を襲っている。韓国市場でのサムスン電子、ＳＫハイニックスの株安が東京市場にも及び、７月１７日の日経平均株価は一時４０００円以上も下げた・・・。

world.title: iQoo tablet with new Snapdragon chipset tipped to debut alongside iQoo 16
world.description: A new iQoo device has appeared in China's SRRC database. According to tipster Digital Chat Station, the device may launch as iQoo's first "mini" tablet. It is also tipped to feature a next-generation flagship Snapdragon chipset and launch alongside the iQoo 16.

world.title: IDAC under scrutiny: Ombudsman to address media on corruption allegations
world.description: Retired Judge Takalani Raulinga, the newly appointed Ombudsman for the Independent Directorate Against Corruption (IDAC), will address media on Sunday regarding the agency's ongoing controversies and allegations of misconduct.
